title_original: Quantum Computing Inc. and Ciena Demonstrate Next-Generation Quantum-Secured Communications with High-Speed Encryption using PQC and QKD at OFC 2026
summary_original: Quantum Computing Inc. and Ciena have demonstrated next-generation quantum-secured communications at OFC 2026, integrating high-speed encryption with both post-quantum cryptography and quantum key distribution. This collaboration showcased a communications system using both classical and quantum-resistant security technologies, aiming to address emerging threats posed by advances in quantum computing. The demonstration highlights a potential path toward protecting critical data transmissions against future quantum-enabled attacks, underscoring increasing urgency in developing quantum-resilient network infrastructure. This is significant in 2026 as industry stakeholders accelerate efforts to secure digital communications against rapidly evolving technological risks introduced by quantum computing.
